title: Archivist Identity Key ID Mismatch
description: Archivist .trust/keys.json has key_id 1a7741b8d353abee but .identity/snapshot.json has key_id d5faddfa2ab2ff3f. This mismatch causes test-three-lane-integration.js to fail.
impact: Integration tests fail; cross-lane trust verification cannot complete
required_action: Archivist must regenerate its identity snapshot to match the trust store key_id, or rotate the trust store key to match the snapshot
